<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/federation/peers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>

</MethodEndpoint>



Register a peer.

Fetches its well-known doc and verifies declaration_sig
(Spec-05-Federation-Trust).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
